candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows conviction=100% on a pair (AUDUSD: 14/30 bear) but green_matches=0 against historical memory, treat the signal as direction-only and gate size down — high live conviction with zero historical regime match is an unvalidated extrapolation, not a confirmed edge.
testable_rule: if consensus_conviction >= 0.90 and green_matches == 0: size_multiplier *= 0.6  # require historical match before full size on extreme-conviction reads
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
